audit_items.proof_trace: After redisFree(c) at line 284, the fail path dereferences c->connection_type, c->tcp.host, c->tcp.port, and c->unix_sock.path (lines 287-290), causing use-after-free.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker can cause connection failure (e.g., refuse connection) leading to goto fail, triggering use-after-free that may crash or leak memory.
